export_page.title: Export B2B

about.title: Production
about.quality_body: Batch checks, spectrophotometer on request for HoReCa and dealers. Production and warehouse under one roof — fewer color drift issues between shipments.
about.batch_body: Every batch is labeled. For wholesale — one batch number per order where volume allows.
about.requisites_body: Contract and invoice details are sent after a request to opt@bententrade.uz (example domain — replace with production).

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.showroom_address: Tashkent, Example St. 1 — visits by appointment.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a_pay: Uzcard, Humo, Payme, Click — sandbox until live keys. Invoice for legal entities — on request.
faq.a_ship: 24–48h by agreement for standard items. XL planters — per production lead time.
faq.a_min_weight: Retail from 1 kg per SKU. Wholesale — per quote volume.
faq.a_pick: Home quiz or product page — no waiting for a manager.
faq.a_returns: Unopened roll — up to 7 days by agreement. Custom orders — separate terms.

quiz.quote_success: Request sent — manager will share PDF quote & invoice.
quiz.quote_phone_required: Enter your phone so we can send the quote

account.sub: Local profile for 1-click: phone stored in your browser.
